title: Goldmann Verlag
content:
{{Top|rwc}}
[[File:Goldmann.png|right|thumb]]
The '''Goldmann Verlag''', known simply as '''Goldmann''', is a German publishing company that was responsible for translating and publishing ''[[Star Wars]]'' media from the English language to German from 1978 until 1999, when they were succeeded by [[Blanvalet]].

{{Company-stub|real}}
